arts.ttl: Atalanta in Monza to consolidate third spot
arts.sum: Among the opponents against which Atalanta have achieved 100% victories against in Serie A, Monza are the one that the Bergamo side have faced the most (5/5); the aggregate score between the Dea and the Biancorossi in the top-flight is 14-3. Atalanta are the team that have earned the most points away from home in this Serie A season (36 in 17 away matches); considering the big five European leagues in 2024-25, only Liverpool (38) and PSG (37) have more points away from home (Barcelona also have 36).
